finding: CM-1000 contained natural-language prose inside its contradicts relation array. The prose was not a stable graph target and failed the aggregate target-existence contract.

claim_states.observed: The original blob stores prose rather than a CM record ID in contradicts.
claim_states.inferred: Prose-only relations prevent deterministic traversal and target validation.
claim_states.proposed: Keep machine relations ID-only and explanatory language in summaries or narrative metadata.
claim_states.superseded: The overbroad validator-completeness claim is now represented as CM-1002 and superseded by linked records rather than silently erased.
claim_states.unresolved: No completed CI execution at the exact migration commit has been observed.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository implementation and abstract project-memory metadata were used. No private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads were published.
falsification_route: Fetch the original CM-1000 blob and current CM-1000/CM-1002 records. Falsify the migration by showing the original prose was not present, the current target does not resolve, the preserved wording differs materially, or the current graph contains a self-reference or supersession cycle.
